summary: Iteration 39 - Client Report Page & Division Cascade Tests. All 30 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Client Report page accessible for Account Manager, GM, and Owner roles. Job search dropdown works with results. Timeframe cycling (Daily/Weekly/Monthly/Quarterly) works. Export PDF button visible and functional. AM Report widget NOT present on Overview (as expected). Metrics widgets span full row width (col-span-full). Coaching Loop widget hidden for Account Manager, visible for Owner/GM.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 39 verified all requested features: 1) Client Report page at /client-report accessible for Account Manager, GM, and Owner roles. 2) Job search API at /api/reports/job-search returns up to 15 results with fuzzy matching. 3) Client quality report API at /api/reports/client-quality supports daily/weekly/monthly/quarterly periods. 4) PDF export at /api/exports/am-report-pdf returns valid PDF with proper headers. 5) AM Report widget removed from OverviewPage (widget-am-report test-id absent). 6) Metrics widgets (Division Quality Trend, Standards Compliance, Training Funnel) span full row width with col-span-full class. 7) Coaching Loop widget hidden for Account Manager (user.title === 'Account Manager'), visible for Owner/GM. 8) Nav sidebar has Client Report link for management and owner roles. 9) Crew division cascade on PATCH /api/crew-access-links/{id} works. 10) Division sync on GET /api/public/crew-member/{code} works.

verified_features.backend_job_search_account_manager: GET /api/reports/job-search returns results for Account Manager
verified_features.backend_job_search_auth_required: Job search requires authentication (401/403 without token)
verified_features.backend_client_quality_property_structur: Properties have property, submissions_count, avg_score, pass_count, fail_count, divisions, submissions
verified_features.backend_pdf_export_owner: GET /api/exports/am-report-pdf returns valid PDF for owner
verified_features.backend_pdf_export_gm: GET /api/exports/am-report-pdf returns valid PDF for GM
verified_features.backend_pdf_export_account_manager: GET /api/exports/am-report-pdf returns valid PDF for Account Manager
verified_features.backend_pdf_export_content_disposition: PDF has Content-Disposition header with attachment and filename
verified_features.backend_pdf_export_all_periods: PDF export works with daily/weekly/monthly/quarterly periods
verified_features.frontend_client_report_nav_account_manag: Client Report nav link visible for Account Manager
verified_features.frontend_client_report_nav_owner: Client Report nav link visible for Owner
verified_features.frontend_client_report_nav_gm: Client Report nav link visible for GM
verified_features.frontend_client_report_header: Client Report header with title and description
verified_features.frontend_client_report_job_search: Job search input with dropdown results
verified_features.frontend_am_report_widget_removed: AM Report widget NOT present on Overview (widget-am-report absent)
verified_features.frontend_metrics_full_width: Metrics widgets row has col-span-full class
verified_features.frontend_coaching_loop_hidden_account_ma: Coaching Loop widget NOT visible for Account Manager
verified_features.frontend_coaching_loop_visible_owner: Coaching Loop widget visible for Owner
verified_features.frontend_coaching_loop_visible_gm: Coaching Loop widget visible for GM
